title: Finding Peace
excerpt: Woke up this morning and saw the Dalai Lama's tweet about the #peacedaychallenge. I hadn't prepared a scripted quote yet for today, so this was a perfect springboard to be inspired by. Still trying to spread more love, peace and…
body:
Woke up this morning and saw the Dalai Lama's tweet about the #peacedaychallenge. I hadn't prepared a scripted quote yet for today, so this was a perfect springboard to be inspired by.

Still trying to spread more love, peace and motivation for each of your Mondays this year. I'm still using this watercolor set from Michaels and I got a new brush from a local art supply store, and found the same Princeton Select brush online at Joann. If you have a favorite quote – silly, snarky or simple in its’ wisdom, please share in the comments!

We have some of my favorite quotes scanned and available as printable PDF's in the shop! Thank you for being a lovely blog reader!
